slice: Deployment and Battle fine formation-facing adjustment

flow: verify Deployment shows 北へ15度, 正面0度, 南へ15度
verify saved fine facing appears in Battle

battle_initial_saved_facing: 戦列 幅20 / 南東斜行 +9度 / 密0.9 / 重0%
battle_after_adjust: 戦列 幅20 / 正面 -6度 / 密0.9 / 重0%
第1戦列歩兵大隊の射界を正面 -6度へ変更。

flow: set mobile viewport while in Battle
verify selected panel and log update

after_adjust: 戦列 幅20 / 南東斜行 +9度 / 密0.9 / 重0%
第1戦列歩兵大隊の射界を南東斜行 +9度へ変更。

notes: Fine facing reuses StandingOrder.facingDeg and therefore persists through existing StandingOrderTemplate saves.
Formation fire-arc and distance logic already read facingDeg, so this is a gameplay-facing control rather than text-only state.
Mobile keeps page horizontal overflow false; the battle map itself intentionally remains horizontally scrollable.
